LanguageData.Major.description: A defining skill, driven by deep passion or a pivotal moment in their past.
LanguageData.Major.label: burning
LanguageData.Minor.description: This skill is found enjoyable, but it’s more of a hobby than a calling.
LanguageData.Minor.label: interested
LanguageData.None.label: none
LanguageData.VSE_Apathy.description: Absolutely no interest in this skill.
LanguageData.VSE_Apathy.label: apathy
LanguageData.VSE_Critical.description: This skill is extremely important in some way, most likely due to events in their past.
LanguageData.VSE_Critical.label: critical
LanguageData.VSE_Natural.description: Naturally good at this skill. However, this means they won’t keep up their practice.
LanguageData.VSE_Natural.label: natural
